prompt_text:
### Demographics: 63-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 10 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Occasional fatigue and thirst with nocturia; no DKA/HHS signs; no severe hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
Heart failure: HFrEF (NYHA Class II)
ASCVD: Peripheral artery disease
MASH
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Pancreatic Cancer (post-treatment surveillance)
Frailty with Mobility Impairment
Rheumatoid Arthritis
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF: HFrEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD: Peripheral artery disease; MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (older brother)
- Social history: Current smoker (5 cigarettes/day for 20 years; ~5 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/month

### Medication information
- Current medications: Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Dapagliflozin 10mg once daily; Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 97.2 kg; Height 171.2 cm; BMI 33.1 kg/m²; Blood pressure 133/74 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.1%; 9 months ago 7.8%; 6 months ago 7.3%; 3 months ago 7.3%; current 6.9%), FPG (12 months ago 175mg/dL; 9 months ago 195mg/dL; 6 months ago 194mg/dL; 3 months ago 194mg/dL; current 139mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 99.9kg; 9 months ago 95.9kg; 6 months ago 96.7kg; 3 months ago 91.6kg; current 97.2kg), Height (12 months ago 171.2cm; 9 months ago 171.2cm; 6 months ago 171.2cm; 3 months ago 171.2cm; current 171.2cm), BMI (12 months ago 34.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 33.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 33.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 31.0kg/m²; current 33.1kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 130mmHg; 9 months ago 134mmHg; 6 months ago 130mmHg; 3 months ago 131mmHg; current 133mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 72mmHg; 9 months ago 72mmHg; 6 months ago 72mmHg; 3 months ago 72mmHg; current 74mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 82U/L; 9 months ago 77U/L; 6 months ago 62U/L; 3 months ago 65U/L; current 80U/L), AST (12 months ago 57U/L; 9 months ago 47U/L; 6 months ago 42U/L; 3 months ago 39U/L; current 54U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.6mg/dL; current 0.6mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 23mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 26mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 21mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 20mL/min/1.73m²; current 21mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 467mg/g; 9 months ago 503mg/g; 6 months ago 519mg/g; 3 months ago 552mg/g; current 552mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 97mg/dL; 9 months ago 96mg/dL; 6 months ago 100mg/dL; 3 months ago 100mg/dL; current 99mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 45mg/dL; 9 months ago 48mg/dL; 6 months ago 49mg/dL; 3 months ago 48mg/dL; current 47mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 170mg/dL; 9 months ago 169mg/dL; 6 months ago 150mg/dL; 3 months ago 172mg/dL; current 161mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.0g/dL; 6 months ago 11.0g/dL; 3 months ago 10.2g/dL; current 10.6g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
